description: Style Note Nail that corporate style with these sharp shoes from arrow with a clean silhouette and tough stitches. If you're looking for a comfy formal shoe that has the durability of everyday staples, this is the right pair. These derby shoes add a roguish twist to your conventional formal ensemble. Product Details Black derby shoe with braided leather upper, overlays, reinforced overlay at the heel counter and four hole lace-up Padded tongue and inner Outsole adhered to the upper Textured TPU outsole with a stacked heel Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
